Package com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.enchantment

Class EnchantmentScroll

java.lang.Object
com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.item.Item
com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.enchantment.EnchantmentScroll
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
public class EnchantmentScroll extends Item
Enchantment Scroll Item

Custom item that represents an Enchanted Book for this plugin.

  • Constructor Details

    • EnchantmentScroll

      public EnchantmentScroll(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin)
      Creates a new EnchantmentScroll. This constructor initializes the item with the appropriate ID, material, name, and other properties by calling the superclass constructor.

  • Method Details

    • addEnchantment

      public void addEnchantment(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack itemStack, Enchantment enchantment, int level)
      Applies the given enchantment to the provided Scroll at the specified level. Overrides any existing level of the same enchantment on the scroll, ensuring that only one instance of each enchantment is present.
      Parameters:
      itemStack - Scroll to apply the enchantment to. This should be an ItemStack of the EnchantmentScroll item, as apply
      enchantment - The Enchantment to apply to the scroll. This should be a valid Enchantment that can be applied to the type of item the scroll is intended for.
      level - The level of the enchantment to apply. This should be a positive integer that (optionally) does not exceed the maximum level for the given enchantment.

    • removeEnchantment

      public void removeEnchantment(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack itemStack, Enchantment enchantment)
      Removes the specified enchantment from the given Scroll.
      Parameters:
      itemStack - Scroll to remove the enchantment from. This should be an ItemStack of the EnchantmentScroll item, as removeEnchantment is intended to operate on enchantment scrolls.
      enchantment - The Enchantment to remove from the scroll. This should be a valid Enchantment that is currently applied to the given scroll.

    • getItem

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack getItem()
      Gets the ItemStack representation of this EnchantmentScroll. This method overrides the superclass method to ensure that the returned ItemStack has the appropriate persistent data container set up to hold enchantment information.
      Overrides:
      getItem in class Item
      Returns:
      An ItemStack representing this EnchantmentScroll, with the necessary persistent data container for enchantments initialized

    • apply

      public void apply(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack scroll, org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Applies the enchantments stored in the given Enchantment Scroll to the specified item.
      Parameters:
      scroll - The ItemStack representing the Enchantment Scroll to apply.
      item - The ItemStack to apply the enchantments to.
